---
title: "ASQ-3 Saudi — Expert Content Review"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    minimal: true
---

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ASQ-3 Saudi — Expert Content Review</title>
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --green:  #1DB584;
    --blue:   #4A90E2;
    --gray:   #F5F5F5;
    --text:   #333333;
    --border: #CCCCCC;
  }

  body {
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
    background: var(--gray);
    color: var(--text);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ── Hero ── */
  .hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green) 0%, var(--blue) 100%);
    color: white;
    padding: 64px 40px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .hero h1 { font-size: 2.4em; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .hero p  { font-size: 1.05em; max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.9; opacity: .97; }

  /* ── Cards ── */
  .card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.09);
    padding: 40px;
    margin: 36px auto;
    max-width: 1200px;
  }
  .card-title {
    font-size: 1.5em;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--green);
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--blue);
  }
  .card-note {
    background: var(--gray);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--blue);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    color: #555;
    font-size: .93em;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  /* ── Form grid ── */
  .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 22px; }
  .form-grid.full { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; }
  .field label { font-weight: 600; font-size: .93em; }
  .req { color: #e03; margin-left: 3px; }
  .field input, .field select, .field textarea {
    padding: 11px 13px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 1em;
    font-family: inherit;
    background: white;
    color: var(--text);
    transition: border-color .2s;
  }
  .field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: var(--green);
  }
  .field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 80px; }

  /* ── Progress bar ── */
  .progress-bar-wrap {
    background: #e5e5e5; border-radius: 99px; height: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 6px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .progress-bar-fill {
    height: 100%; border-radius: 99px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), var(--blue));
    transition: width .4s ease;
  }
  .progress-label { font-size: .85em; color: #666; text-align: right; margin-bottom: 20px; }

  /* ── Table ── */
  .tbl-wrap { overflow-x: auto; margin-top: 10px; }
  table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: .93em; }
  thead { background: var(--green); color: white; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; }
  th { padding: 13px 10px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25); }
  td { padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; vertical-align: top; }
  tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: #fafafa; }
  tbody tr:hover { background: #f0f8f5; }

  .domain-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 99px;
    font-size: .78em;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: white;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .dom-Communication   { background: #4A90E2; }
  .dom-Gross-motor     { background: #E2844A; }
  .dom-Fine-motor      { background: #9B59B6; }
  .dom-Problem-solving { background: #E24A4A; }
  .dom-Personal-social { background: #1DB584; }

  .rating-sel {
    width: 64px; padding: 6px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 5px; font-size: .88em; text-align: center; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .rating-sel:focus { border-color: var(--green); outline: none; }
  .comment-ta {
    width: 100%; min-width: 110px; padding: 6px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 5px;
    font-size: .82em; min-height: 54px; font-family: inherit; resize: vertical;
  }

  /* ── Buttons ── */
  .btn-row { display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 48px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn {
    padding: 13px 38px; border: none; border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: .97em; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; transition: all .2s;
  }
  .btn-green  { background: var(--green); color: white; }
  .btn-green:hover  { background: #17a374; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(29,181,132,.35); }
  .btn-gray   { background: #6c757d; color: white; }
  .btn-gray:hover   { background: #5a6268; transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-blue   { background: var(--blue); color: white; }
  .btn-blue:hover   { background: #3a7bc8; transform: translateY(-2px); }

  /* ── Alerts ── */
  .alert { display: none; padding: 15px 20px; border-radius: 6px; margin: 0 auto 24px; max-width: 1200px; border-left: 5px solid; }
  .alert-success { background: #eafaf3; border-color: var(--green); color: #1a6643; }
  .alert-error   { background: #f8d7da; border-color: #dc3545; color: #721c24; }

  /* ── Loading spinner ── */
  #loadingMsg { text-align: center; padding: 50px 20px; color: #888; }
  .spinner {
    width: 40px; height: 40px; margin: 0 auto 14px;
    border: 4px solid #ddd;
    border-top-color: var(--green);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spin .8s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

  /* ── Footer note ── */
  .footnote { text-align: center; color: #888; font-size: .87em; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 40px; }

  @media (max-width: 720px) {
    .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .card { padding: 22px; margin: 20px 12px; }
    .hero { padding: 40px 20px; }
    .hero h1 { font-size: 1.8em; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══════════════════ HERO ═══════════════════ -->
<div class="hero">
  <h1>Expert Content Review</h1>
  <p>
    Dear Researcher and Expert Reviewer,<br><br>
    Thank you for contributing your expertise to the <strong>ASQ-3 Saudi Arabic validation study</strong>.
    Your evaluation of each item is essential for ensuring that this developmental screening measure
    is culturally appropriate, linguistically sound, and psychometrically reliable for use in the
    Saudi Arabian context. Please rate each item on <em>quality</em> and <em>clarity</em>, then
    download your ratings as a CSV file and email it to the research team.
  </p>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════ ALERTS ═══════════════════ -->
<div id="alertSuccess" class="alert alert-success"></div>
<div id="alertError"   class="alert alert-error"></div>

<!-- ═══════════════════ CREDENTIALS ═══════════════════ -->
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-title">Reviewer Credentials</div>
  <div class="card-note">Please provide your professional information. Fields marked with <span style="color:#e03">*</span> are required.</div>
  <form id="expertForm">
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="field">
        <label>Full Name <span class="req">*</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="fullName" required placeholder="Dr. / Prof. ...">
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Email <span class="req">*</span></label>
        <input type="email" id="email" required placeholder="you@institution.edu">
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Institution / Organization</label>
        <input type="text" id="institution" placeholder="e.g., King Abdulaziz University">
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Primary Field of Expertise <span class="req">*</span></label>
        <select id="expertise" required>
          <option value="">— Select —</option>
          <option value="child_development">Child Development / Developmental Psychology</option>
          <option value="pediatrics">Pediatrics / Pediatric Medicine</option>
          <option value="clinical_psychology">Clinical Psychology / Neuropsychology</option>
          <option value="speech_language">Speech-Language Pathology</option>
          <option value="special_education">Special Education</option>
          <option value="occupational_therapy">Occupational Therapy</option>
          <option value="education">Education / Early Childhood Education</option>
          <option value="other">Other</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Years of Professional Experience <span class="req">*</span></label>
        <input type="number" id="yearsExperience" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 15" required>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Arabic Language Proficiency <span class="req">*</span></label>
        <select id="language" required>
          <option value="">— Select —</option>
          <option value="native">Native Speaker</option>
          <option value="fluent">Fluent / Proficient</option>
          <option value="intermediate">Intermediate</option>
          <option value="basic">Basic</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:18px;" class="form-grid full">
      <div class="field">
        <label>Additional Professional Background <span style="color:#999;font-weight:400">(optional)</span></label>
        <textarea id="additionalInfo" placeholder="Relevant certifications, research experience, etc."></textarea>
      </div>
    </div>
  </form>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════ ITEMS ═══════════════════ -->
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-title">Item Evaluation</div>
  <div class="card-note">
    For each item, rate <strong>Quality</strong> (how well it measures its developmental domain) and
    <strong>Clarity</strong> (how easily parents understand it).<br>
    Scale: <strong>1</strong> = Poor/Unclear &nbsp;·&nbsp; <strong>3</strong> = Adequate &nbsp;·&nbsp; <strong>5</strong> = Excellent/Very Clear.
    Add comments where needed.
  </div>

  <!-- progress -->
  <div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar-fill" id="progressFill" style="width:0%"></div></div>
  <div class="progress-label" id="progressLabel">0 of 0 items rated</div>

  <!-- table -->
  <div id="loadingMsg">
    <div class="spinner"></div>
    Loading items…
  </div>
  <div class="tbl-wrap" id="tableWrap" style="display:none">
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th style="width:7%">Month</th>
          <th style="width:13%">Domain</th>
          <th style="width:6%">Code</th>
          <th style="width:24%">Arabic Item</th>
          <th style="width:23%">English Item</th>
          <th style="width:8%;text-align:center">Quality<br>(1–5)</th>
          <th style="width:8%;text-align:center">Clarity<br>(1–5)</th>
          <th style="width:11%">Comments</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════ BUTTONS ═══════════════════ -->
<div class="btn-row">
  <button class="btn btn-gray" onclick="resetForm()">Clear All</button>
  <button class="btn btn-green" onclick="downloadCSV()">⬇ Download My Ratings (CSV)</button>
</div>
<p class="footnote">After downloading, please email your CSV file to the research team.</p>

<script>
// ── CSV parser ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function parseCSV(text) {
  const lines = text.trim().split(/\r?\n/);
  const headers = splitCSVLine(lines[0]);
  return lines.slice(1).map(line => {
    const cols = splitCSVLine(line);
    const obj = {};
    headers.forEach((h, i) => { obj[h] = (cols[i] ?? '').trim(); });
    return obj;
  });
}
function splitCSVLine(line) {
  const cols = []; let cur = '', inQ = false;
  for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
    const ch = line[i];
    if (ch === '"') { inQ = !inQ; }
    else if (ch === ',' && !inQ) { cols.push(cur); cur = ''; }
    else { cur += ch; }
  }
  cols.push(cur);
  return cols.map(c => c.replace(/^"|"$/g, ''));
}

// ── Domain badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const domClass = {
  'Communication':   'dom-Communication',
  'Gross motor':     'dom-Gross-motor',
  'Fine motor':      'dom-Fine-motor',
  'Problem-solving': 'dom-Problem-solving',
  'Personal-social': 'dom-Personal-social'
};

// ── Build table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let totalItems = 0;
function buildTable(items) {
  totalItems = items.length;
  const tbody = document.getElementById('tbody');
  const opts = '<option value="">—</option>' + [1,2,3,4,5].map(n =>
    `<option value="${n}">${n}</option>`).join('');

  items.forEach((row, i) => {
    const n = i + 1;
    const dc = domClass[row.domain] || '';
    const badge = dc
      ? `<span class="domain-badge ${dc}">${row.domain}</span>`
      : row.domain;
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `
      <td style="white-space:nowrap;font-size:.85em">${row.quest_label || ''}</td>
      <td>${badge}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.85em"><strong>${row.item_code || ''}</strong></td>
      <td dir="rtl" lang="ar" style="text-align:right;font-size:.97em">${row.item_text_ar || ''}</td>
      <td style="font-size:.92em">${row.item_text_en || ''}</td>
      <td style="text-align:center">
        <select class="rating-sel" id="q_${n}"
          data-quest="${row.quest_label||''}" data-code="${row.item_code||''}"
          onchange="updateProgress()">
          ${opts}
        </select>
      </td>
      <td style="text-align:center">
        <select class="rating-sel" id="c_${n}" onchange="updateProgress()">${opts}</select>
      </td>
      <td><textarea class="comment-ta" id="t_${n}"></textarea></td>`;
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
  });

  document.getElementById('loadingMsg').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('tableWrap').style.display  = 'block';
  updateProgress();
}

// ── Progress ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function updateProgress() {
  let rated = 0;
  for (let i = 1; i <= totalItems; i++) {
    const q = document.getElementById('q_' + i);
    const c = document.getElementById('c_' + i);
    if (q && q.value && c && c.value) rated++;
  }
  const pct = totalItems ? Math.round(rated / totalItems * 100) : 0;
  document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width  = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressLabel').textContent =
    `${rated} of ${totalItems} items rated (${pct}%)`;
}

// ── Load CSV ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
(async function () {
  const paths = ['data/item_quality_template.csv', 'item_quality_template.csv'];
  for (const p of paths) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(p);
      if (!res.ok) continue;
      const items = parseCSV(await res.text()).filter(r => r.item_code);
      buildTable(items);
      return;
    } catch (e) { /* try next */ }
  }
  document.getElementById('loadingMsg').innerHTML =
    '<p style="color:#c00">⚠ Items could not be loaded. Please open this page through a web server (not as a local file).</p>';
})();

// ── Validation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function validate() {
  const g  = id => document.getElementById(id).value.trim();
  const rx = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
  if (!g('fullName'))          { err('Full Name is required.');                    return false; }
  if (!rx.test(g('email')))    { err('A valid Email is required.');                return false; }
  if (!g('expertise'))         { err('Field of Expertise is required.');           return false; }
  if (!g('yearsExperience'))   { err('Years of Experience is required.');          return false; }
  if (!g('language'))          { err('Arabic Language Proficiency is required.');  return false; }
  return true;
}
function err(msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById('alertError');
  el.textContent = msg; el.style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('alertSuccess').style.display = 'none';
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}
function ok(msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById('alertSuccess');
  el.textContent = msg; el.style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('alertError').style.display = 'none';
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

// ── CSV escape ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const esc = v => {
  const s = String(v ?? '');
  return (s.includes(',') || s.includes('"') || s.includes('\n'))
    ? '"' + s.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"' : s;
};

// ── Download ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function downloadCSV() {
  if (!validate()) return;
  const g = id => document.getElementById(id).value.trim();
  const expert = {
    name: g('fullName'), email: g('email'), inst: g('institution'),
    exp: g('expertise'), yrs: g('yearsExperience'), lang: g('language')
  };
  const rows = [['reviewer_name','reviewer_email','institution','expertise',
                 'years_experience','language','quest_label','item_code',
                 'quality','clarity','comments']];
  for (let i = 1; i <= totalItems; i++) {
    const q = document.getElementById('q_' + i);
    rows.push([
      esc(expert.name), esc(expert.email), esc(expert.inst),
      esc(expert.exp),  esc(expert.yrs),   esc(expert.lang),
      esc(q?.getAttribute('data-quest') || ''),
      esc(q?.getAttribute('data-code')  || ''),
      document.getElementById('q_' + i)?.value || '',
      document.getElementById('c_' + i)?.value || '',
      esc(document.getElementById('t_' + i)?.value || '')
    ]);
  }
  const blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF' + rows.map(r => r.join(',')).join('\n')],
                        { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
  const a = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), {
    href: URL.createObjectURL(blob),
    download: 'asq3_review_' + expert.name.replace(/\s+/g, '_') + '.csv'
  });
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
  ok(`Ratings downloaded successfully. Please email the CSV file to the research team. Thank you, ${expert.name}!`);
}

// ── Reset ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function resetForm() {
  document.getElementById('expertForm').reset();
  document.querySelectorAll('.rating-sel').forEach(el => el.value = '');
  document.querySelectorAll('.comment-ta').forEach(el => el.value = '');
  document.getElementById('alertError').style.display   = 'none';
  document.getElementById('alertSuccess').style.display = 'none';
  updateProgress();
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
```
